A British Brand We are based in the UK and all our products are designed here by our team of experts. We Love Our Planet Here is a few of the Talking Tables team enjoying a tree planting day in Guilford 400 trees were planted :) Meet The Talking Tables Team Here's a picture of our team enjoying a summer social event, it was was a lovely sunny day in London! Charity is at the heart of us We host parties for elderly residents in our local community. Here's a pic from our annual bingo event held at our office this summer.
